case_title: DELMA LAMAR JEFFERSON VS. ABBAS HACHEM ET AL

docket_entries.description: MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-20-2019 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF DELMA JEFFERSON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

DISCOVERY 302, "IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS CURRENTLY CALENDARED IN DEPARTMENTS 301/302 ARE HEREBY VACATED. WHEN THE COURT RESUMES NORMAL OPERATIONS, THE PRESIDING JUDGE WILL ANNOUNCE PROCEDURES FOR SETTING HEARING DATES FOR THOSE CASES WHICH HAVE BEEN FULLY BRIEFED. OPPOSITIONS WILL BE DUE BASED ON THE RESCHEDULED HEARING DATE, BUT NOTHING PRECLUDES A PARTY FROM FILING AN OPPOSITION EARLIER." (302)

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUL-29-2020 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF DELMA JEFFERSON'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE THE APPLICATION AS TO JURY FEES, COURT-APPOINTED INTERPRETER FEES FOR A WITNESS, FEES FOR A PEACE OFFICER TO TESTIFY IN COURT, FEES FOR COURT-APPOINTED EXPERTS. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/SKF)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF INTERPRETER PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 (COURT-APPOINTED INTERPRETER FEES FOR A WITNESS) AS TO PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON, DELMA LAMAR

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-02-2020 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF DELMA JEFFERSON'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART THE APPLICATION. THE COURT GRANTED THE WAIVER AS TO JURY FEES AND EXPENSES BUT DENIED AS TO WAIVER OF COURT-APPOINTED INTERPRETER FEES FOR A WITNESS, FEES FOR A PEACE OFFICER TO TESTIFY IN COURT AND FEES FOR COURT-APPOINTED EXPERTS. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-05-2021 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE AND ALL TRIAL-RELATED DATES. PLAINTIFF DELMA LAMAR JEFFERSON APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT VIA COURTCALL. DEBORAH BJONERUD, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS ABBAS HACHEM AND MAYA GHORAYEB VIA COURTCALL. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE OPPOSITION WAS UNTIMELY AND IT WAS NOT CONSIDERED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 9/20/21 IS VACATED AND NEW THE NEW TRIAL DATE IS 12/8/21 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL REGULAR DISCOVERY IS CLOSED WITH THE EXCEPTION OF 2034 CCP EXPERT DISCOVERY WHICH WILL TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE OF 12/8/21. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT IS APPROVED AS TO FORM. COURT TO SEND NOTICE AND TIME OF PLACE OF TRIAL. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-06-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance is made in this matter.

DEFENDANT PANDORA MEDIA CALIFORNIA, LLC's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is ordered off calendar. CCP 430.41 requires a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer may be filed; counsel's declaration indicates that has not occurred. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and defendant's response to the complaint is now due by December 2, 2020.

Judge: Rchard Ulmer; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
